properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I love You, Lord Oh Your mercy never fails me All my days, I've been held in Your hands From the moment that I wake up Until I lay my head I will sing of the goodness of God

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: And all my life You have been faithful And all my life You have been so, so good With every breath that I am able Oh, I will sing of the goodness of God

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I love Your voice You have led me through the fire In the darkest night You are close like no other I've known You as a Father I've known You as a Friend And I have lived in the goodness of God

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: 'Cause Your goodness is running after It's running after me Your goodness is running after It's running after me With my life laid down I'm surrendered now I give You everything 'Cause Your goodness is running after It's running after me
